sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Indaptus Therapeutics Signs Securities Purchase Agreement With David Lazar
feed.summary: Indaptus Therapeutics has executed a Securities Purchase Agreement with David Lazar to raise $6.0 million through a private placement of convertible preferred stock. This deal involves the issuance of 300,000 shares of Series AA and 700,000 shares of Series AAA stock at $6.00 per share, convertible into 111,000,000 common shares pending stockholder approval. The proceeds from this private placement are earmarked for operational expenses, severance, and general corporate purposes.

feed.title: Curated Wealth Partners LLC Sells 3,090 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Curated Wealth Partners LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 22.4%, selling 3,090 shares and retaining 10,675 shares valued at $2.595 million. This represents about 0.3% of the fund's portfolio. Alphabet recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced plans to acquire Intersect for $4.75 billion to bolster its AI infrastructure, despite facing some legal and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) has received an average "Hold" rating from 19 analysts, with a consensus 12-month price target of $70.02. The company reported Q3 EPS of $1.02, in line with estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.6925 per share, resulting in a 4.4% yield. Hedge funds have shown varied activity in EQR, with some increasing and some decreasing their stakes.

feed.title: Corient Private Wealth LLC Lowers Stake in Grand Canyon Education, Inc. $LOPE

Despite this, institutional investors still hold about 94.17% of the stock. The company recently reported Q3 EPS in line with expectations and slightly above-expected revenue, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating.

feed.title: Fermata Advisors LLC Has $13.64 Million Stock Position in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Fermata Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Apple Inc. by 6% in Q3, holding 53,570 shares valued at $13.64 million, making Apple its largest position. Insider selling, including significant sales by Tim Cook and Katherine Adams, saw over 228,000 shares sold last quarter. Despite analyst upgrades and positive sentiment around Apple's AI roadmap, regulatory fines in Italy and an app-store settlement in Brazil, along with reports of large institutional selling, present potential near-term headwinds for the company.

feed.title: Contravisory Investment Management Inc. Decreases Stake in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Contravisory Investment Management Inc. has reduced its stake in Apple Inc. by 10.8% in the third quarter, now holding 41,434 shares valued at $10.55 million. Despite this, Apple continues to outperform quarterly expectations, reported $1.85 EPS against $1.74 estimated, and revenue of $102.47 billion, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $283.92. However, insider selling and regulatory challenges in Italy and Brazil could impact App Store revenues.

feed.title: Kenworth Expands PACCAR Automated Transmissions in New Models
feed.summary: Kenworth now offers its PACCAR TX-12 PRO and TX-18 PRO automated transmissions, featuring rear engine PTO compatibility, on its T880 and W990 trucks. This expansion allows these Class 8 trucks to be used in concrete mixer and other REPTO-driven applications, providing greater flexibility and integrated powertrain performance. Both transmissions are designed for vocational use, offering features like PACCAR’s Extreme Duty clutch and Rock Free mode to enhance maneuverability and productivity in challenging terrains.

feed.title: Andrew Hill Investment Advisors Inc. Sells 4,294 Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX
feed.summary: Andrew Hill Investment Advisors Inc. reduced its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) by 53.7%, selling 4,294 shares. This leaves them with 3,709 shares valued at approximately $1.45 million, representing 1.1% of their portfolio. Despite institutional selling by this firm and recent insider sales totaling $67.33 million, institutional ownership remains high at 90.96%, with large funds like Vanguard and Norges Bank adding positions.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX Shares Sold by Anderson Hoagland & Co.

Wagner Jr. and Chairman Jeffrey M. Leiden, totaling over $35 million in December. feed.title: Assenagon Asset Management S.A. Invests $2.75 Million in Bio-Techne Corp $TECH

feed.title: NetApp Honors Top Partners in India at Partner Summit 2025
feed.summary: NetApp announced the winners of its India Partner Awards for Fiscal Year 2025 (FY’25) at its Partner Summit, celebrating partners excelling in AI, cyber resilience, data infrastructure modernization, and cloud transformation. The awards recognize partners instrumental in driving NetApp’s vision to help enterprises address complex digital transformation challenges, aligning with India's projected digital transformation market growth to US$126.8 billion by 2033. Notable winners include Binary Global Ltd. & Swan Solutions & Services Pvt Ltd. for Partner of the Year, and Hitachi Systems India Pvt. Ltd. for both Customer Retention and Innovation Partner of the Year.

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL is Chapin Davis Inc.'s Largest Position
feed.summary: Chapin Davis Inc. has maintained Apple Inc. ($AAPL) as its largest holding despite a slight reduction in its stake during Q3 2025. The firm now holds 99,651 shares valued at approximately $25.38 million, representing 6.2% of its portfolio. While other institutional investors have adjusted their positions, and insider selling has been observed, analysts rate Apple as a "Moderate Buy" with a target price around $283.92, balancing AI optimism against regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT Shares Acquired by Central Valley Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Central Valley Advisors LLC increased its Microsoft stake by 10.7% in Q3, bringing its total to 18,636 shares valued at approximately $9.65 million. This makes Microsoft its 8th biggest holding, comprising about 3.0% of the firm's portfolio. Microsoft recently surpassed quarterly expectations with $4.13 EPS on $77.67 billion revenue, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $631.03.

feed.title: Pentagon Expands Lockheed Martin Contract o $25 Billion, Taps Boeing For Another $2 Billion Engine Replacement Program
feed.summary: The Pentagon has significantly expanded its contract with Lockheed Martin for C-130J aircraft to $25 billion and awarded Boeing a new $2 billion contract for the B-52 commercial engine replacement program. These developments reflect a continued focus on strengthening U.S. and allied defense capabilities, despite recent criticism from Donald Trump regarding defense contractors' executive pay and program delays.

feed.title: PPL stock price target raised to $37 from $36 at UBS on earnings tailwinds
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for PPL Corp (NYSE:PPL) to $37 from $36, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock, citing earnings tailwinds from public convenience order and transmission investments. The firm also raised its EPS growth forecast for PPL and identified catalysts like the Pennsylvania rate case settlement expected around 2026. This adjustment follows PPL's stronger-than-expected Q3 2025 earnings and other strategic developments.

feed.title: The Home Depot, Inc. $HD Shares Sold by Baxter Bros Inc.

This comes after Home Depot reported Q3 EPS of $3.74, missing estimates, and set its FY2025 EPS guidance lower than analyst expectations. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $2.30, and several executive insiders sold shares.

feed.title: Dividend Stocks Are the Gift that Will Keep On Giving You More Income in 2026
feed.summary: Investing in dividend-paying stocks can provide a continuous income stream, making them an ideal gift for yourself this holiday season to boost income in 2026. Top dividend investments like Realty Income, Brookfield Infrastructure, and the Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF offer steady growth and reliable payouts. These options provide exposure to diversified assets and companies with strong track records of increasing dividends.

feed.title: Who Owns BlackRock Stock? A Guide To BLK Stock
feed.summary: This article details the ownership structure of BlackRock (BLK) stock, highlighting that it is primarily institutional, with Vanguard Group Inc. being the largest reported beneficial owner. It explains that while BlackRock itself can appear as a major holder due to its role as an investment adviser to funds, this reflects client-directed capital rather than proprietary bets. The piece also guides investors on how to verify BLK stock ownership through SEC filings.

feed.title: Why Truist sees Salesforce (CRM) positioned for AI-driven growth
feed.summary: This article from Truist suggests that Salesforce (CRM) is well-positioned for growth driven by artificial intelligence. It indicates that Salesforce's strategic moves and offerings are aligning with the increasing demand for AI-powered solutions in the market. The analysis points to the company's potential to capitalize on the AI trend.

feed.title: Bacterial Protein Market Is Going to Boom |• Thermo Fisher Scientific • Merck KGaA
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports (WMR) has released a new research study predicting substantial growth for the "Bacterial Protein Market," offering a comprehensive analysis of market dynamics, drivers, restraints, and competitive landscapes. The report segments the market by types (Food and Beverage, Animal Feed, Pharmaceuticals, etc.) and applications (Biotechnology, Food Industry, Agriculture, etc.), with a regional outlook covering North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and MEA. It aims to provide actionable intelligence and growth forecasts to assist businesses in strategic planning and identifying high-potential opportunities.

feed.title: Eneos leads bids for Chevron’s Singapore oil refinery stake
feed.summary: Japan's Eneos Holdings is reportedly leading bids for a 50% stake in Singapore Refining Company (SRC), owned by U.S. heavyweight Chevron. Other contenders include commodity giants Glencore and Vitol, as global oil majors divest assets in Singapore. The sale highlights the region's importance for oil trading and refining margins, attracting companies seeking to reinvest commodity profits.

feed.title: PETG Plastic Sheet Market Is Going to Boom |• Sabic • Eastman Chemical Company
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has published a research study on the PETG Plastic Sheet Market, predicting substantial growth in coming years. The report offers a comprehensive analysis including market dynamics, drivers, restraints, challenges, growth opportunities, and technological advancements, aimed at providing actionable intelligence and forecasts for global and regional markets. It also highlights key players like Sabic and Eastman Chemical Company and segments the market by type and application.

feed.title: McDonald's hit with class action over McRib's missing rib meat
feed.summary: McDonald's is facing a federal class action lawsuit over its McRib sandwich, with four consumers alleging the company misled millions by marketing the product as containing actual pork rib meat when it contains none. The lawsuit, filed on December 23, 2025, in the Northern District of Illinois, claims the sandwich uses "reconstructed" meat from lower-grade pork products. Plaintiffs are seeking damages across multiple states, arguing that consumers paid premium prices under false pretenses and were swayed by deceptive marketing and the sandwich's rib-shaped patty.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap brokers $17.5M Bushwick retail sale
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap has successfully brokered the $17.5 million sale of a fully-leased, 10-unit experiential retail property located at 321 Starr Street in Bushwick. The sale was arranged by Shaun Riney, Michael Salvatico, Scott Plasky, and Alexander Arustamanian to a Canadian family entering the New York City market. The property, renovated in 2017, features over 7,000 square feet of outdoor rooftop space and tenants like MetroRock, 48 Cypress, and New York Film Lab.

feed.title: Lincoln Educational Services renews executive contracts through 2028
feed.summary: Lincoln Educational Services (NASDAQ:LINC) has renewed the contracts of its five top executives through December 31, 2028, with new base salaries effective January 1, 2026. The company's stock has seen over 60% growth in the past year, and it recently reported strong Q3 2025 results, exceeding earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Ramaco will spend up to $100M buying back its own stock in 2 years
feed.summary: Ramaco Resources announced a Board-authorized share repurchase program of up to $100 million of its Class A common stock, to be executed over 24 months starting December 23, 2025. This opportunistic program will preserve liquidity for its capital development and follows over $600 million in capital raises in the second half of 2025. The company stated this move is a means of returning capital to shareholders and reflects confidence in its operational performance and financial strength.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Europe SE reports Avadel Pharmaceuticals dealings
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Europe SE recently disclosed its trading activities in Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (NASDAQ:AVDL) securities, involving the purchase and immediate sale of 3,791 ordinary shares on December 23, 2025, at $21.5675 per share. The firm, classified as a connected exempt principal trader, held no relevant securities in Avadel Pharmaceuticals following these transactions. This disclosure was made in compliance with Irish regulatory requirements under the Irish Takeover Panel Act, specifically Rule 38.5(b) and Rule 38.6.

It covers key players, market segments by type and application, and regional insights to assist stakeholders in strategic decision-making.

feed.title: Franklin Resources Inc. Stock Underperforms Tuesday When Compared To Competitors
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc.'s stock underperformed on Tuesday compared to its competitors. This article briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, including revenue increasing 35% year-over-year to $609 million and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Wedbush Calls Microsoft (MSFT) a Core AI Winner With $625 Price Target
feed.summary: Wedbush has reiterated its "Outperform" rating for Microsoft (MSFT) with a $625 price target, identifying it as a core AI winner. Analyst Dan Ives believes the market is underestimating Microsoft's Azure growth and AI-driven expansion, expecting AI to significantly boost revenue and margins by 2026. Channel checks suggest strong deployment of Azure and Copilot, potentially adding $25 billion to the company's fiscal 2026 revenue.

feed.title: Fused Silica Windows Market Is Going to Boom |• Corning Inc. • Schott AG
feed.summary: Worldwide Market Reports has published a new research study on the Fused Silica Windows Market, projecting substantial growth in the coming years. The report offers a comprehensive analysis including market dynamics, drivers, restraints, challenges, growth opportunities, technological advancements, and a competitive analysis featuring key players like Corning Inc. and Schott AG. It also provides regional insights and forecasts, supported by extensive primary and secondary research, to assist businesses in strategic planning.

feed.title: International Paper’s Strategic Overhaul: A Path to Margin Stability?
feed.summary: International Paper is undergoing a major corporate transformation involving facility closures, a significant acquisition, and portfolio optimization to focus on its core packaging operations. Investors are keenly watching the upcoming financial release on January 29, 2026, for indications that these strategic actions, including the sale of its cellulose fibers business and the DS Smith acquisition, will lead to lasting margin improvement and stabilize North American containerboard shipments. The success of this strategy hinges on effective cost reductions and seamless volume relocation without disruption, which would validate the investment thesis despite elevated debt levels.

feed.title: Red then green: Tractor market leaders through the years
feed.summary: This article traces the history of U.S. tractor market leadership, from International Harvester's dominance in the 1950s to John Deere's subsequent rise through the 1960s and beyond, fueled by technological innovation and a strong dealer network. It also highlights the current landscape, noting John Deere's continued leadership, the consolidation into CNH Industrial and Agco, and the significant growth of Kubota, particularly in the compact tractor segment. The shifting market reflects broader agricultural trends like fewer, larger farms and changing labor demands.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Europe SE reports Avadel Pharmaceuticals dealings By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley Europe SE disclosed its trading in Avadel Pharmaceuticals plc (NASDAQ:AVDL) securities, reporting both a purchase and a sale of 3,791 ordinary shares on December 23, 2025, at $21.5675 per share. Following these transactions, Morgan Stanley held no relevant securities in Avadel Pharmaceuticals. The disclosure complies with Irish regulatory requirements for connected exempt principal traders during takeover periods.
